title: Mouthwatering Juicy Kenyan Lamb Stew
description: A winey and juicy Kenyan dish featuring full fat yogurt and ferment kimchi, this crowd-pleaser is perfect for special occasions. It is also ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly, making it a great option for those looking for a dish that aligns with their dietary principles.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped kimchi to the pot and cook for 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the red wine to the pot, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Add the beef broth, tomato paste, garam masala, salt, and black pepper to the pot, stirring to combine.
Return the lamb to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2.5 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Stir in the full fat yogurt and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
